content.subject: Re: Unable to configure SMTP relay for my domain

body.text:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team
body.html:
Hi Jane,

Great to hear that you've added your IP range to the whitelist!

IP whitelist propagation typically takes just around 15 minutes to complete. Please wait for about 15 minutes and then try your SMTP relay connection again.

If you continue to experience authentication errors after that time, please let us know and we can investigate further.

Best regards,
Support Team

content.subject: Re: Unable to configure SMTP relay for my domain

body.text:
Hi Jane,

Thank you for following up. I'm happy to confirm that IP whitelist propagation typically takes around 15 minutes. The changes should become active within that time frame.

Once the 15 minutes have passed, please try to retry your SMTP relay configuration. The 550 authentication error should now be resolved.

If you still encounter any issues after 15 minutes, please let me know and we can investigate further. Feel free to retry now as well, but the propagation delay is very short.

Best regards,
CPaaS Support Team
body.html:
Hi Jane,

Thank you for following up. I'm happy to confirm that IP whitelist propagation typically takes around 15 minutes. The changes should become active within that time frame.

Once the 15 minutes have passed, please try to retry your SMTP relay configuration. The 550 authentication error should now be resolved.

If you still encounter any issues after 15 minutes, please let me know and we can investigate further. Feel free to retry now as well, but the propagation delay is very short.

Best regards,
CPaaS Support Team

expected_params.title: Core Router Firmware Upgrade v2.1
expected_params.description: Firmware upgrade for multiple core routers in the Core Network domain. This is a standard maintenance change to upgrade router firmware to version 2.1 for improved performance, security patches, and bug fixes.

predicted_params.title: Core Router Firmware Upgrade v2.1
predicted_params.description:
This change request involves upgrading firmware to version 2.1 on multiple core network routers (ND-CORE-01 segment). The upgrade aims to enhance network stability, improve security patches, and provide better performance characteristics.

**Scope of Work:**
- Firmware upgrade from current version to v2.1 on designated core routers
- System validation after firmware installation
- Post-upgrade testing to ensure network continuity and performance
- Documentation of configuration changes and verification steps

**Expected Outcomes:**
- Enhanced security posture with latest firmware features
- Improved network reliability and performance
- Address any known vulnerabilities addressed in firmware v2.1

**Testing Strategy:**
- Pre-upgrade baseline verification
- Post-upgrade functional validation
- Performance benchmarking

This is a planned standard maintenance activity with no expected customer impact.

expected_params.initial_summary: APAC region interconnect experiencing high packet loss
expected_params.detailed_description: Monitoring system is continuously alerting about significant packet loss on interconnect connections in the APAC region. Issue is considered severe.

predicted_params.initial_summary: High packet loss detected on APAC region interconnect connections
predicted_params.detailed_description: Monitoring system has been continuously alerting on interconnect connections in the APAC region, reporting sustained high packet loss rates. The detected packet loss is approximately 15%, which exceeds the normal threshold of 5%. This level of packet loss can significantly impact application performance and data integrity for customers using these interconnect services. The issue appears to be affecting multiple connections within the APAC geography, suggesting a potential backbone or infrastructure-level problem. Immediate investigation is required to determine the root cause and implement remediation steps.

risk_assessment.fallback_plan: Roll back to primary path if secondary path performance is unacceptable

content.subject: [Incident INC-2024-0821-A1] Service Degradation - us-east-1 Region
content.body_text:
Dear Customer,

We are currently experiencing a service degradation affecting connectivity in the us-east-1 region (North Virginia / DC Metro). Our team is actively working to mitigate the issue.

Impact Details:
- Region: us-east-1 (POP-EQX-ASH1, POP-EQX-NYC1)
- Issue: Partial outage affecting Layer 2 Virtual Circuits and Cloud Exchange Direct Connect
- Root Cause: Upstream fiber utility cut

Actions Taken:
- We are proactively rerouting affected traffic through secondary gateways
- Engaging with upstream fiber provider for repair ETA

We will provide further updates as they become available. Thank you for your patience.

Regards,
TaaS Operations Team

expected_params.summary: Corrected affected region from APAC to us-east-1 based on scope analysis
expected_params.details: Initial incident creation indicated APAC region as affected. Scope analysis confirmed actual impact is in us-east-1 (North Virginia / DC Metro), affecting sites POP-EQX-ASH1 and POP-EQX-NYC1.

predicted_params.reason: Correcting geographic scope based on analysis results. Originally reported as APAC, but actual impact is in us-east-1.

customers.impact_summary: Primary circuit down; backup path active. Requires traffic diversion to restore full connectivity.
Experiencing high latency on peering links.
Packet loss observed on monitoring probes.

expected_params.reason: 诊断发现上游服务严重问题：payment-processor 连接流失和 TLS 握手失败（可用性 94.5%），inventory-db 慢查询阻塞连接池（响应 420ms）。24小时内错误率 2.5%，P99 延迟 1250ms 超标。为稳妥起见回滚到稳定版本。

predicted_params.reason: 上游服务存在严重问题：payment-processor 连接流失和 TLS 失败（850ms 响应，67% 错误），inventory-db 慢查询阻塞连接池（420ms 响应）。诊断发现 P99 延迟峰值达 4100ms，虽然当前 metrics 看着正常，但风险较高。为保障系统稳定性，回滚 canary 部署到稳定版本。

expected_params.name: Fix NY-BOS Congestion - Phase 1
expected_params.description: Reroute 20% of non-critical traffic from the congested primary link (CR-London-Primary-04 -> ES-Manchester-Agg-01) to the secondary link via CR-London-Secondary-02. This will alleviate congestion during peak hours (18:00-22:00), reduce latency from 45ms to baseline levels (~12ms), and mitigate SLA penalty risk for FinTech Global Ltd ($15,000 at risk).

business_case.justification: High SLA penalty risk of $45,000 total, with $15,000 immediately at risk for FinTech Global Ltd. Active incident inc_8821_net_slow is correlated with this congestion. Rerouting 20% non-critical traffic will reduce utilization from 94.2% to ~75%, bringing latency back within SLA thresholds.

predicted_params.name: Fix NY-BOS Congestion - Phase 1
predicted_params.description:
Reroute 20% of non-critical traffic via secondary link CR-London-Secondary-02 to alleviate congestion on the primary inter-aggregation link (HundredGigE0/2/0/5). This addresses SLA breach risk for FinTech Global Ltd (Gold SLA - Latency) and resolves active user-reported issues in Manchester region (incident inc_8821_net_slow).

**Key objectives:**
1. Reduce peak utilization on primary link from 94.2% to target <85%
2. Improve average latency from 45ms to baseline 12ms (target ≤50ms)
3. Eliminate packet loss (target 0%)
4. Protect critical FinTech customer SLA (Gold tier)

**Scope:**
- Core routers: CR-London-Primary-04 (ne_core_rtr_88), CR-London-Secondary-02
- Edge switches: ES-Manchester-Agg-01 (ne_edge_sw_21)
- Traffic classes: Non-critical enterprise traffic, SME general
- Affected subscribers: 15,420 total (125 enterprise, 12 VIP)

**Implementation approach:**
Create routing policy to prefer secondary link for non-critical traffic, allowing real-time adjustments without service disruption.

business_case.justification: High priority mitigation for SLA breach risk (potential $45K penalty) and active customer incident with 92% correlation. Protects Gold SLA for 12 VIP customers including FinTech Global Ltd critical latency-sensitive operations.
